name: Produce!
description: Japanese developer formed by former Irem staff, known for Super Bomberman, The 7th Saga, Brain Lord, Mystic Ark, and Neo Bomberman.

eras.title: SNES and Hudson / Enix Era
eras.description: Produce! develops SNES RPGs and Bomberman entries for publishers such as Hudson Soft and Enix.

eras.title: Late Arcade and PlayStation Era
eras.description: Later period covering arcade, PlayStation, and smaller projects before the company disappears.
